revision.text:
;Holy Sutra ;Nectarean Shower of Holy Doctrines
==English translation with ''kanji''== ===God 神===
:One day the Angel 天使 came to Seicho-No-Ie 生長の家 and sang:
:God the Creator 創造の神 :Is beyond the five senses 五感, :Even beyond the sixth sense 六感,
:Holy 聖, :Supreme 至上, :Infinite 無限,
:Mind 心 that penetrates the universe, :Life 生命 that permeates the universe, :Law 法則 that governs the universe,
:Truth 真理, :Light 光明, :Wisdom 知恵, :Absolute love 絶対の愛 –
:These are the very nature of the Gra nd Life 大生命 – :The Divine attributes 真性 of God, the Absolute 絶対の神.
:When God 神 appears :There is goodness 神, :There is justice 義, :There is benevolence 慈悲; :Harmony 調和 comes of itself, :All living things 一切の生物 find their proper place :And there will be no strife 争, :No preying upon one another 相食, :No sickness 病, :No torment 苦 :And none will be in need.
:God indeed is All 渾 of everything; :God is absolute and dwells in all things, :Nothing exists beyond Him.
:God embraces the whole of Reality 実在.
:All that exists is solely His creation.
:God, in creating all things, :Uses no clay 粘土, :No wood 木材, :No hammer 槌, :And no chisel 鑿;
:He uses neither tools 道具 nor materials 材料 whatsoever; :He creates solely with His Mind 心.
:His Mind is the Creator of all things, :His Mind is the Substance 実質 that fills the universe, :His Mind is indeed Almighty God 全能, the Omnipresent 偏在.
:When the Mind of this Almighty 全能 God, and perfect 完全 God, ::moves and becomes the Word コトバ[言葉], :All things of the True-Image World ::unfold and come into being 現象展開.
:All things 万物 are the Idea of God 神の心, :All things 万物 are the Word of God 神のコトバ, :Everything is Spirit 霊, :Everything is the Divine Mind 心, :Nothing exists that is made of matter 物質.
:Matter is merely a shadow 影 of the mind. :​ :To see the shadow and regard it as Reality 実在 is delusion 迷. :Do not be swayed by delusion.
:Reality is eternal 永遠 and can never be destroyed 滅. :Delusion is momentary 須臾 and will vanish 破摧 at once.
:Reality is freedom 自在 and without suffering 悩, :Delusion is a state of bondage 捉 filled with suffering 苦患.
:Reality is Truth 真理, :Delusion is falsehood 仮相.
:Reality transcends the five senses 五官, :Is even beyond the sixth sense 第六感 :And can never be perceived 映 by the senses of men 人々の感覚.
===Spirit 霊===
:The senses 感覚 perceive nothing ::but the shadow of beliefs 信念の影. :Although you may possess spiritual eyes ::and see the figure of a spirit, :You have not seen Reality.
:All that you can perceive 視得 ::through your senses 感覚 :are merely shadows of the mind 心の影 ::and not the principal Reality 第一義的実在.
:Spirits 霊 differ 甲乙 in their appearance 姿.
:There are spirits who are ill 病, :There are spirits who are suffering 苦, :There are spirits who suffer from a stomach disorder 胃病 ::although they have no stomach, :There are spirits who suffer from a heart disease 心臓病, ::yet they have no heart of their own – :These are all delusions 迷.
:When such spirits possess a man, :The possessed 憑 manifests either a stomach disorder or a heart disease. :Yet the various suffering spirits :That appear to the spiritual senses are not the principal Reality 第一義的実在. :They are the shadows of constantly changing delusions 流転せる迷の影 driven by mistaken beliefs 誤れる信念. :The beliefs of the erroneous mind, constantly changing, may appear as a temporary form 仮の相.
:Yet, whatever the form that may appear, :A temporary form is eternally false and can never be Reality.
:Do not fear what is unreal, :Do not treat as Reality what is unreal.
:Confront what is unreal with Reality. :Dismiss what is not true with the true.
:Oppose 相対 falsehood 仮相 with the True Image 実相. :Face darkness 闇 with light 光.
:Only Reality 実在 can extinguish unreality 非実在. :Only the True Image 実相 can destroy falsehood 仮相. :Only Truth 真理 can break down untruth 虚妄. :Only Light can prove 証明 the nothingness of darkness.
:Teach 教 them the True Image of life 生命の實相. :Teach them that the True Image of life is God 神 Himself and perfect 完全. :Teach them that since God is All in all, :Since He did not create sin 罪 :And since there is no Creator 造り主 other than God, :In this world there is neither the committing of sin ::nor sin to be atoned for.
:When all the spirits in the universe 三界の諸霊 ::And all living beings in the universe 三界の諸生命 :Visualize 観 this Truth 真理, ::Awaken to this Truth 真理 :And destroy 摧破 all delusions of the mind 顛倒妄想 ::which are the source of all sufferings 一切苦患の源, :All the angels of heaven 天界の諸神 ::will shower 雨 down a chorus of Truth 理の合唱 :And all life in this world 現世の生命 ::will turn toward the Light.
:All delusions 惑障 will vanish 消滅 ::and this world will, as it is, turn 示現 into a brilliant paradise 光明世界.
===Matter 物質===
:Do not consider 感覚 matter 物質 perceived through your senses as Reality 実在.
:Matter is not the substance of things, :Not life 生命, :Not Truth 真理.
:Matter itself has neither intelligence 知性 :Nor sensations 感覚.
:Matter is, after all 畢竟, nothingness 無 :and has no properties of its own 自身の性質.
:It is but mind 心 alone that gives properties to matter 性質. :When your mind thinks of good health 健康, health appears; :When your mind thinks of sickness 病, sickness appears.
:Just as with a movie screen 映画の舞台面, :When a wrestler 力士 is projected a wrestler appears, :When an invalid 病人 is projected an invalid appears.
:Yet the film 映画のフィルム itself is transparent 無色透明 :With neither wrestler nor invalid of its own.
:It is simply that the images produced by the photographic chemicals 印画液 :cover 蔽 the transparent film :And give rise to the figure 模様 of a wrestler or that of an invalid.
:Yet both the healthy wrestler and the infirm invalid 虚弱 are shadows from :the action of the photographic chemicals :And they are not Reality.
:If you run a transparent film 無色透明のフィルム through a movie projector 活動写真の映写機 and project 映写 it onto a screen 舞台面, :There will be neither a healthy wrestler, :Who will grow old before long and die, :Nor, of course 無論, the frail invalid 虚弱; :On the screen 舞台面 there will be light itself :And life itself, shining brilliantly 照り輝.
:Now you must know: :Your life is greater than that of the healthy wrestler.
:However healthy the wrestler, :As long as he looks upon his physical body as Reality, :As long as he regards himself as no more than his physical body 肉体, :He is one who will perish and is without real health 真の『健康』.
:Real health 真の『健康』 is not in matter, not in the physical body; :Real life 真の『生命』 is not in matter, not in the physical body; :The real you, your real self, is not in matter, not in the physical body.
:Beyond matter 物質の奥, :Beyond the physical body 肉体の奥 :There is a wondrous 霊妙 perfect 完全 being 存在.
:This indeed is your perfect 儘の完全 real self 汝そのもの exactly as created by God, :Constantly healthy 常住健康 and eternally indestructible 永遠不滅 life 生命. :Now is the time to transcend matter and awaken to the True Image of your life 汝自身の『生命』の実相.
===Reality 実在===
:The Angel 天使 continued: :Reality 実在 is eternal 永遠, :Reality does not fall ill 病, :Reality does not age 老, :Reality does not die 死.
:To know this truth 真理 is to know 知 the Way 道.
:Since Reality 実在 without want fills 満 the universe 宇宙, it is called the Way; :The Way is with God 道, :God is indeed the Way and Reality.
:Those who know 知 and dwell 住 in Reality will transcend 超越 destruction 消滅 :And be in constant perfection and harmony 常住円相.
:Life knows living and does not know death. :Life is another name for Reality 生命は実在の又の名.
:Reality has neither beginning 始 nor ending 終, :Neither destruction 滅 nor death 死.
:Hence life too has neither beginning nor ending, :Neither destruction nor death.
:Life is above the measure of time 時間の尺度 :And also above the measure of age 老朽の尺度.
:On the contrary, time 時間 is controlled by life 生命の掌中.
:Time is but a single moment 一点 when confined 握 by life, :Time is infinite 無窮 when released 開 by life.
:Therefore those who believe 思 they are young 若 ::will be restored to youth 若返り at once 忽 :And those who believe they have aged ::will instantly grow old and frail.
:Space 空間, too, never restricts 限定 life. :Rather, space is but a mode for perception 認識の形式 created by life 生命の造りたる.
:Life is primary 主 and space is secondary 従. :The patterns of the ideas 観念の紋 emanating 放射 from life and projected 投影 upon space :Are what we call matter.
:Matter is essentially nothingness 本来無 :With neither qualities 自性 nor power of its own.
:The distortions 歪み that arise when life passes through the mode for perception 認識の形式 :Present an appearance that in matter there are qualities or again the power to control life.
:Do not be attached to distortions, :See the True Image of life correctly.
:Those who know the True Image of life :Will transcend karma 因縁 and gain 獲得 the original undistorted 本来の歪み, perfect freedom of life 円相的自由.
===Wisdom 智慧===
:Wisdom in essence is the light of God 本来神のひかり[光], :Perfect and harmonious light 無量光、無辺光, that accompanies Reality, :Infinite and omnipresent light that fills and illuminates all things 一切のもの.
:Since man is a child of light 光の子 and always 常 dwells in light 光の中, :Man knows neither darkness 暗 :Nor failure 躓 :Nor hindrance さわり[障り].
:Like the celestial beings 天人 of heaven 天界, :Like the fishes 海魚 that swim through the seas 水中, :Man moves about in a world of light 光の世界, filled with light 光 and exultation 法悦. :Wisdom 知恵 is the light of enlightenment 悟りの光, :The Truth that illuminates and destroys 照破 delusion 無明の暗.
:Truth alone is Reality 真理のみ実在. :Delusion, being merely unenlightened Truth, is like a bad dream 悪夢.
:Then take care to not see 観 bad dreams. :When you awaken, this world becomes at once a radiant paradise 光明楽土 :And you will manifest 顕現 your True Image 実相–brilliant and shining life 光明生命.
:God is infinite, omnipresent light of Wisdom 神は無量光、無辺光の知恵, :Goodness 善 without limitation, :Life 生命 without limitation, :The Substance 実質 of all things 一切のもの[物], :Also the Creator 創造主 of all things 一切のもの[物]. :Therefore God is present everywhere.
:God, being the omnipresent 偏在 Substance 実質 and the Creator, :Good is the only power 善のみ唯一の力, :Good is the only life 善のみ唯一の生命, :Good is the only Reality 善のみ唯一の実在.
:Hence there is no power 力 other than good, :There is no life 生命 other than good, :There is no Reality 実在 other than good.
:Power that is not good–namely the power 力 that brings misfortune 不幸–is, :after all 畢竟, only a bad dream 悪夢.
:Life that is not good–namely sickness 病–is, :after all, only a bad dream.
:All discord 不調和 and all imperfections 不完全 :are in fact only bad dreams.
:Our bad dreams 悪夢 give power to sickness 病気, misfortune 不幸, discord 不調和 and imperfection 不完全; :As when oppressed by evil 悪魔 in a bad dream, :When we awaken we find that no power had truly oppressed us :And that we had merely suffered from a dream of our own creation.
:Indeed the power of evil, :The power that oppresses our life, :The power that causes us to suffer, :Is not a power that truly exists in Reality.
:It is merely our mind suffering :from a dream of its own creation.
:In the Way of the Buddha 仏の道 this is called delusion 無明 :Because the perfect and harmonious True Image of life 完全円満の生命の實相 has not been awakened to.
:In the Way of God 神の道 this is called sin 罪 :Because the perfect and harmonious True Image of life 完全円満の生命の實相 is concealed and not manifested.
===Delusion 無明===
:When the Angel 天使 sang thus at Seicho-No-Ie, :A cherub 一人の天の童子 appeared and said: :"For the sake of mankind, :for the sake of their spiritual enlightenment, :pray reveal the true nature 本質 of delusion."
:The Angel replied: :Delusion exists because we imagine 想像 that what is nonexistent exists. :Ignorance of the true state of things is called delusion.
:Pleasure and pain 快苦 are originally not in matter; :Believing they exist in matter, :We either pursue or flee from them – :Such erroneous thoughts are called delusion 顛倒妄想.
:Life is essentially not in matter; :The false thought that there is life in matter is called delusion 妄想.
:Essentially matter 本来物質 is in mind. :Mind is the master of matter. :Despite the fact that mind is the creator of the qualities and shapes of matter 物質の性質形態, :We mistakenly believe 誤信 that mind is controlled 支配 by matter :And, according to the changes in matter 物質の変化, we worry 憂苦し and torment 懊悩し ourselves. :Not to awaken to the perfect and harmonious 円満完全 True Image of our life is called delusion.
:Since delusion is the opposite 反対 of what is true, ::it is ignorance 無明. :Since delusion is the opposite of Reality, ::it is unreality 非実在. :If delusion were real, ::The sufferings 憂苦も懊悩も born of delusion would be real.
:But as delusion is the absence of Reality, :Those sufferings 憂苦も懊悩も are only bad dreams from which we must awaken and are not real.
===Sin 罪===
:"Has sin real existence?" asked the cherub 天の童子 again.
:The Angel's voice could be heard 声聞 in reply: :All that is truly Reality is only God and the things that have come of Him. :God is perfect 完全 :And all that God has created is also perfect. :I ask you then, :Do you consider sin to be perfect?
:The cherub replied: :"Lord, sin is not perfect." 『師よ、罪は完全に非ず』
:The Angel continued: :Sin is imperfect 罪は不完全 and therefore not real; :Sickness is imperfect 病は不完全 and therefore not real; :Death is imperfect 死は不完全 and therefore not real;
:Do not take for Reality what is not God's creation. :Do not fear what is unreal, imagined in a bad dream.
:Sin, sickness and death are not God's creations 神の所造.
:Therefore, although they appear to wear the mask of Reality 実在の仮面, :They are nonexistent 非実在 and false 虚妄.
:I have come to remove 剥 this mask 仮面 and prove :that sin, sickness and death are nonexistent 罪と病と死との非実在.
:Shakyamuni Buddha 釈迦牟尼如来 also came for this purpose. :Jesus Christ イエスキリスト also came for this purpose.
:If sin were real, :All the Buddhas 十方の諸仏 ::could not erase sin :Nor could the crucifixion of Jesus Christ イエスキリストの十字架 ::erase sin.
:How blessed are you that sin is nonexistent ::and a shadow of delusion.
:Hence the Buddhas 十方の諸仏 have embraced 摂取 all living beings 衆生 and erased 消滅 their sins 罪. :Jesus Christ イエスキリスト, too, merely by saying the words 言葉 "Thy sins are forgiven" 『汝の罪赦されたり』 ::erased sin.
:I, too, have had the Songs of Seicho-No-Ie 『生長の家の歌』 put into words :And by the power of the word have exposed 暴露 the true nature of sin 罪の本質, :Returning 帰 it to its original nothingness 本来の無.
:Those who read my words will know 知る the true aspect of Reality 実在の実相 ::And erase all their sins 一切の罪消滅す.
:Those who read my words, will know 知る the true aspect of life 生命の実相, :Vanquish all illnesses 一切の病消滅し, :Transcend death and live eternally 死を超えて永遠に生きん.
===Man 人間===
:I 吾 am Truth 真理, :The Angel from Truth, :The Light that shines brilliantly from Truth, :The Light that illuminates and destroys delusion.
:I am the Way 道, :Those who live by my Words 言葉 will not err from the Way.
:I am Life 生命, :Those who draw from me will neither fall ill nor die.
:I am Salvation 救, :Those who trust 頼 in me will all be taken in 摂取 and dwell in the True-Image Realm.
:When the Angel had thus recited, :The cherub asked again: :"Lord 師よ, explain the true nature of man."
:The Angel replied: :Man is not matter, :He is not a physical body.
:He consists of neither brain cells 脳髄細胞 nor nerve cells 神経細胞, :He is neither blood cells 血球 nor blood serum 血清 nor muscle cells 筋肉細胞; :Nor is he the composite of them all.
:You must awaken 悟 to the True Image of man 人間の実相.
:Man is spirit 霊, :Man is life 生命, :Man is immortality 不死.
:God is the radiant source 光源 of man :And man is light emanating 出 from God.
:Without light 光の無き there is no radiant source 光源, :Without a radiant source 光源の無き there is no light 光.
:Just as light 光 and its radiant source 光源 are inseparable, :God and man are one 人間と神とは一体なり.
:God is Spirit 霊, :Therefore man is also Spirit.
:God is Love 愛, :Therefore man is also Love.
:God is Wisdom 知恵, :Therefore man is also Wisdom.
:Spirit is not material in nature, :Love is not material in nature, :Wisdom is not material in nature,
:Therefore, :Man, who is spirit, love and wisdom :Has nothing to do with matter.
:The real man, :Being spirit, :Being love, :Being wisdom :And being life, :Cannot commit a sin, :Cannot become ill :And cannot die.
:Sin 罪, sickness 病 and death 死 are merely 畢竟 your own bad dreams.
:Awaken to the True Image of life 生命の実相.
:Awaken 自覚 to your True Image which is the real man 『真性の人間』.
:Real man 『真性の人間』 is God-man 神人, :The image of God Himself.
:He who perishes 滅ぶる is not the real man. :He who commits sin 罪を犯す is not the real man. :He who becomes ill 病に罹る is not the real man.
:Mankind 地上の人間よ, I say to you: :Awaken to your own true nature.
:You yourselves are the real man 『真性の人間』 and never anything else.
:Therefore, when seen from Truth 真理の眼 :Man cannot commit sin 罪を犯す事能, cannot fall ill 病に罹る事能 and cannot die 滅ぶること能.
:Who could dare say, "You sinners, sinners" 『罪人よ、罪人よ』?
:Since God did not create sinners, :There is not a single sinner in this world.
:Sin is contrary 反す to the child of God's true nature 神の子の本性. :Sickness is contrary 反す to the true nature of life itself 生命自身の本性, :Death is contrary 反す to the true nature of life itself 生命其自身の本性.
:Sin, sickness and death 罪と病と死とは are merely 畢竟 nonexistent shadows of delusion 妄想, :imagined in a bad dream.
:In the True-Image World 実相の世界 :God and man are one 神と人とは一体なり; :God is the radiant source 光源, :Man is the light emanated from God.
:The illusion 根本妄想 that has led mankind to see the bad dream :That sin, sickness and death 罪と病と死とが are real :Is rooted in the ancient theology 神学 that man is made from dust 塵.
:More recently it is founded on modern science's 近代科学 claim that man is made of matter.
:These are the first dream 最初の夢 which led mankind to the illusion of sin, sickness and death 罪と病と死との妄想.
:When the first dream 最初の夢 is destroyed 摧破, :The fundamental cause 根本原因 of sin, sickness and death is destroyed 摧破.
:And they return 帰 to their original nothingness 本来の無.
:You recover from illness 病の癒 by reading the Seicho-No-Ie and knowing the Truth :Because your first dream is destroyed この最初の夢の摧破.
:When there is no first dream 最初の夢, :There will be no dreams to follow 次の夢.
:When there are no dreams at all, ::as man is originally undefiled 本来人間清浄, :He cannot commit a sin even if he so desires.
:When there are no dreams at all, ::as man is originally free from illness, :He cannot fall ill even if he so desires.
:When there are no dreams at all, ::as man is originally infinite life 本来永生, :he will never die 死滅.
:Therefore, all people of the world 地上の人間よ :Seek with the utmost care 心を尽して your Spiritual essence 自己の霊なる本体, :Do not seek this Spiritual essence in matter 物質 and in the physical body 肉体 :which are the products of dreams and illusory thoughts 夢と妄想との産物.
:Christ said: :"The kingdom of God is within you." 『神の国は汝らの内にあり』
:Truly, I say to you: :"Within you 『汝らの内』" means your true nature, the real man 『人間の自性』.
:Since your true nature 『自性』 is God-man 神人, the kingdom of God 神の国 is only "within you 『汝らの内』."
:He who seeks the kingdom of God without 永遠に神の国 pursues a dream; :He will never find the kingdom of God.
:He who seeks the kingdom of God in matter 物質に神の国 also pursues a dream; :He can never build the kingdom of God upon this earth.
:Christ キリスト also said: :"My kingdom is not of this world 『吾が国は此の世の国にあらず』."
:The kingdom of this world 此の世の国 is merely a shadow 唯影. :The realm of eternal happiness 常楽の国土 is within 内 you alone.
:Only when you have awakened 自覚 to the realm of eternal happiness within 内に常楽の国土 :Can the realm of eternal happiness 外に常楽の国土 be manifest 顕現 without as a reflection 映.
:Only when you have awakened to the life of infinite health within 内に無限健康の生命 :Can infinite health 外に肉体の無限健康 be manifest without as a reflection.
:Man's five senses 人間の五官 can perceive no more than a world of reflection 『映しの世界』. :If you wish to purify 浄 the world of reflection, you must purify the original mental plates 心の原版 :By removing the dusts of delusion 迷の汚点.
:I have indeed seen the emptiness of the world of matter 物質の世界の虚. :I have seen that the world of matter 物質の世界 is nothing but a shadow. :I have seen too that man is light radiated from God. :I have seen that the physical body is but a shadow 影 of the mind.
:Matter is but a changing shadow :Resembling the ever-shifting 移 shadows on a revolving lantern 走馬灯.
:Therefore do not mistake the shadows that you see for Reality.
:Man's real nature 人間真性 is God-man 神人, :Eternal, indestructible, immortal Spirit 永遠不壊不滅の霊体 and not a machine 機械 made from matter, :Nor did matter first exist and then the Spirit reside 宿 within it.
:Such dualism 二元論 is entirely false 誤.
:Just as a silkworm 蚕 does not live 存在 in a cocoon 繭 which first exists, :But spins 吐 its thread to form its cocoon and then dwells within it, :Matter is a shadow of the Spirit and a product of the mind.
:Man's real nature 人間の真性 is above all life that is Spirit, :Spinning his mind-threads 心の糸 he forms his body-cocoon 肉体の繭 :and then he resides within it :And in this way the Spirit becomes the physical body.
:Realize well that ::the cocoon is not the silkworm. :If this is so, likewise the physical body is not man ::But merely his cocoon.
:Just as when the time comes ::the silkworm breaks out from its cocoon and flies away 羽化登仙 :Man, too, when his time has come ::leaves his body-cocoon 肉体の繭 and ascends 昇天 to the spiritual world 霊界.
:Never assume the death of the physical body to be the death of man.
:Man is Life :And therefore he will never know death.
:In accordance with the state of his mind 想念, the time 時 and his needs 必要, :Various conditions 様々の状態 may appear in his physical body 肉体 and circumstances 境遇.
:Yet life itself cannot fall ill, :Life itself cannot die.
:By changing your mind :You may freely 自在 change your health 健康 and circumstances 境遇.
:Yet the time 時至 will finally come :when life no longer needs its physical body-cocoon.
:Life shall leave its physical body-cocoon :And soar 天翔 on to an even freer realm 一層自在の境地.
:Do not mistake this for the death of man.
:The essence of man is Life, :There can never be death for him.
:When the Angel had thus sang 天使語, :Exquisite and delicate heavenly music 微妙の天楽の声聞 could be heard in the sky 虚空, :Flower petals 葩 showered from where we knew not, :As if in praise of the Truth 真理 taught by the Angel.
:(End of the Holy Sutra 聖経終)
:May 願 the merits 功徳 of this Holy Sutra extend to all beings, :And may we, together with all living beings 我等と衆生と皆倶, awaken to and fulfill :our True Image 実相.
'''End'''
==English translation without ''kanji''== ===God===
:One day the Angel came to Seicho-No-Ie and sang:
:God the Creator :Is beyond the five senses, :Even beyond the sixth sense,
:Holy, :Supreme, :Infinite,
:Mind that penetrates the universe, :Life that permeates the universe, :Law that governs the universe,
:Truth, :Light, :Wisdom, :Absolute love –
:These are the very nature of the Grand Life – :The Divine attributes of God, the Absolute.
:When God appears :There is goodness, :There is justice, :There is benevolence; :Harmony comes of itself, :All living things find their proper place :And there will be no strife, :No preying upon one another, :No sickness, :No torment :And none will be in need.
:God indeed is All of everything; :God is absolute and dwells in all things, :Nothing exists beyond Him.
:God embraces the whole of Reality.
:All that exists is solely His creation.
:God, in creating all things, :Uses no clay, :No wood, :No hammer, :And no chisel;
:He uses neither tools nor materials whatsoever; :He creates solely with His Mind. :​ :His Mind is the Creator of all things, :His Mind is the Substance that fills the universe, :His Mind is indeed Almighty God, the Omnipresent.
:When the Mind of this Almighty God, and perfect God, ::moves and becomes the Word, :All things of the True-Image World ::unfold and come into being.
:All things are the Idea of God, :All things are the Word of God, :Everything is Spirit, :Everything is the Divine Mind, :Nothing exists that is made of matter.
:Matter is merely a shadow of the mind. :​ :To see the shadow and regard it as Reality is delusion. :Do not be swayed by delusion.
:Reality is eternal and can never be destroyed. :Delusion is momentary and will vanish at once.
:Reality is freedom and without suffering, :Delusion is a state of bondage filled with suffering.
:Reality is Truth, :Delusion is falsehood.
:Reality transcends the five senses, :Is even beyond the sixth sense :And can never be perceived by the senses of men.
===Spirit===
:The senses perceive nothing ::but the shadow of beliefs. :Although you may possess spiritual eyes ::and see the figure of a spirit, :You have not seen Reality.
:All that you can perceive ::through your senses :are merely shadows of the mind ::and not the principal Reality.
:Spirits differ in their appearance.
:There are spirits who are ill, :There are spirits who are suffering, :There are spirits who suffer from a stomach disorder ::although they have no stomach, :There are spirits who suffer from a heart disease, ::yet they have no heart of their own – :These are all delusions.
:When such spirits possess a man, :The possessed manifests either a stomach disorder or a heart disease. :Yet the various suffering spirits :That appear to the spiritual senses are not the principal Reality. :They are the shadows of constantly changing delusions driven by mistaken beliefs. :The beliefs of the erroneous mind, constantly changing, may appear as a temporary form.
:Yet, whatever the form that may appear, :A temporary form is eternally false and can never be Reality.
:Do not fear what is unreal, :Do not treat as Reality what is unreal.
:Confront what is unreal with Reality. :Dismiss what is not true with the true.
:Oppose falsehood with the True Image. :Face darkness with light.
:Only Reality can extinguish unreality. :Only the True Image can destroy falsehood. :Only Truth can breakdown untruth. :Only Light can prove the nothingness of darkness.
:Teach them the True Image of life. :Teach them that the True Image of life is God Himself and perfect. :Teach them that since God is All in all, :Since He did not create sin :And since there is no Creator other than God, :In this world there is neither the committing of sin ::nor sin to be atoned for.
:When all the spirits in the universe ::And all living beings in the universe :Visualize this Truth, ::Awaken to this Truth :And destroy all delusions of the mind ::which are the source of all sufferings, :All the angels of heaven ::will shower down a chorus of Truth :And all life in this world ::will turn toward the Light.
:All delusions will vanish ::and this world will, as it is, turn into a brilliant paradise.
===Matter===
:Do not consider matter perceived through your senses as Reality.
:Matter is not the substance of things, :Not life, :Not Truth.
:Matter itself has neither intelligence :Nor sensations.
:Matter is, after all, nothingness :and has no properties of its own.
:It is but mind alone that gives properties to matter. :When your mind thinks of good health, health appears; :When your mind thinks of sickness, sickness appears.
:Just as with a movie screen, :When a wrestler is projected a wrestler appears, :When an invalid is projected an invalid appears.
:Yet the film itself is transparent :With neither wrestler nor invalid of its own.
:It is simply that the images produced by the photographic chemicals :cover the transparent film :And give rise to the figure of a wrestler or that of an invalid.
:Yet both the healthy wrestler and the infirm invalid are shadows from :the action of the photographic chemicals :And they are not Reality.
:If you run a transparent film through a movie projector and project it onto a screen, :There will be neither a healthy wrestler, :Who will grow old before long and die, :Nor, of course, the frail invalid; :On the screen there will be light itself :And life itself, shining brilliantly.
:Now you must know: :Your life is greater than that of the healthy wrestler.
:However healthy the wrestler, :As long as he looks upon his physical body as Reality, :As long as he regards himself as no more than his physical body, :He is one who will perish and is without real health.
:Real health is not in matter, not in the physical body; :Real life is not in matter, not in the physical body; :The real you, your real self, is not in matter, not in the physical body.
:Beyond matter, :Beyond the physical body :There is a wondrous perfect being.
:This indeed is your perfect real self exactly as created by God, :Constantly healthy and eternally indestructible life. :Now is the time to transcend matter and awaken to the True Image of your life.
===Reality=== :​ :The Angel continued: :Reality is eternal, :Reality does not fall ill, :Reality does not age, :Reality does not die.
:To know this truth is to know the Way.
:Since Reality without want fills the universe, it is called the Way; :The Way is with God, :God is indeed the Way and Reality.
:Those who know and dwell in Reality will transcend destruction :And be in constant perfection and harmony.
:Life knows living and does not know death. :Life is another name for Reality.
:Reality has neither beginning nor ending, :Neither destruction nor death.
:Hence life too has neither beginning nor ending, :Neither destruction nor death.
:Life is above the measure of time :And also above the measure of age.
:On the contrary, time is controlled by life.
:Time is but a single moment when confined by life, :Time is infinite when released by life.
:Therefore those who believe they are young ::will be restored to youth at once :And those who believe they have aged ::will instantly grow old and frail.
:Space, too, never restricts life. :Rather, space is but a mode for perception created by life.
:Life is primary and space is secondary. :The patterns of the ideas emanating from life and projected upon space :Are what we call matter.
:Matter is essentially nothingness :With neither qualities nor power of its own.
:The distortions that arise when life passes through the mode for perception :Present an appearance that in matter there are qualities or again the power to control life.
:Do not be attached to distortions, :See the True Image of life correctly.
:Those who know the True Image of life :Will transcend karma and gain the original undistorted, perfect freedom of life.
===Wisdom=== :​ :Wisdom in essence is the light of God, :Perfect and harmonious light, that accompanies Reality, :Infinite and omnipresent light that fills and illuminates all things.
:Since man is a child of light and always dwells in light, :Man knows neither darkness :Nor failure :Nor hindrance.
:Like the celestial beings of heaven, :Like the fishes that swim through the seas, :Man moves about in a world of light, filled with light and exultation. :Wisdom is the light of enlightenment, :The Truth that illuminates and destroys delusion.
:Truth alone is Reality. :Delusion, being merely unenlightened Truth, is like a bad dream.
:Then take care to not see bad dreams. :When you awaken, this world becomes at once a radiant paradise :And you will manifest your True Image–brilliant and shining life.
:God is infinite, omnipresent light of Wisdom, :Goodness without limitation, :Life without limitation, :The Substance of all things, :Also the Creator of all things. :Therefore God is present everywhere.
:God, being the omnipresent Substance and the Creator, :Good is the only power, :Good is the only life, :Good is the only Reality.
:Hence there is no power other than good, :There is no life other than good, :There is no Reality other than good.
:Power that is not good–namely the power that brings misfortune–is, :after all, only a bad dream.
:Life that is not good–namely sickness–is, :after all, only a bad dream.
:All discord and all imperfections :are in fact only bad dreams.
:Our bad dreams give power to sickness, misfortune, discord and imperfection; :As when oppressed by evil in a bad dream, :When we awaken we find that no power had truly oppressed us :And that we had merely suffered from a dream of our own creation.
:Indeed the power of evil, :The power that oppresses our life, :The power that causes us to suffer, :Is not a power that truly exists in Reality.
:It is merely our mind suffering :from a dream of its own creation.
:In the Way of the Buddha this is called delusion :Because the perfect and harmonious True Image of life has not been awakened to.
:In the Way of God this is called sin :Because the perfect and har monious True Image of life is concealed and not manifested.
===Delusion=== :​ :When the Angel sang thus at Seicho-No-Ie, :A cherub appeared and said: :"For the sake of mankind, :for the sake of their spiritual enlightenment, :pray reveal the true nature of delusion."
:The Angel replied: :Delusion exists because we imagine that what is nonexistent exists. :Ignorance of the true state of things is called delusion.
:Pleasure and pain are originally not in matter; :Believing they exist in matter, :We either pursue or flee from them – :Such erroneous thoughts are called delusion.
:Life is essentially not in matter; :The false thought that there is life in matter is called delusion.
:Essentially matter is in mind. :Mind is the master of matter. :Despite the fact that mind is the creator of the qualities and shapes of matter, :We mistakenly believe that mind is controlled by matter :And, according to the changes in matter, we worry and torment ourselves. :Not to awaken to the perfect and harmonious True Image of our life is called delusion.
:Since delusion is the opposite of what is true, ::it is ignorance. :Since delusion is the opposite of Reality, ::it is unreality. :If delusion were real, ::The sufferings born of delusion would be real.
:But as delusion is the absence of Reality, :Those sufferings are only bad dreams from which we must awaken and are not real.
===Sin===
:"Has sin real existence?" asked the cherub again.
:The Angel's voice could be heard in reply: :All that is truly Reality is only God and the things that have come of Him. :God is perfect :And all that God has created is also perfect. :I ask you then, :Do you consider sin to be perfect?
:The cherub replied: :"Lord, sin is not perfect."
:The Angel continued: :Sin is imperfect and therefore not real; :Sickness is imperfect and therefore not real; :Death is imperfect and therefore not real;
:Do not take for Reality what is not God's creation. :Do not fear what is unreal, imagined in a bad dream.
:Sin, sickness and death are not God's creations.
:Therefore, although they appear to wear the mask of Reality, :They are nonexistent and false.
:I have come to remove this mask and prove :that sin, sickness and death are nonexistent.
:Shakyamuni Buddha also came for this purpose. :Jesus Christ also came for this purpose.
:If sin were real, :All the Buddhas ::could not erase sin :Nor could the crucifixion of Jesus Christ ::erase sin.
:How blessed are you that sin is nonexistent ::and a shadow of delusion.
:Hence the Buddhas have embraced all living beings and erased their sins. :Jesus Christ, too, merely by saying the words "Thy sins are forgiven" ::erased sin.
:I, too, have had the Songs of Seicho-No-Ie put into words :And by the power of the word have exposed the true nature of sin, :Returning it to its original nothingness.
:Those who read my words will know the true aspect of Reality ::And erase all their sins.
:Those who read my words, will know the true aspect of life, :Vanquish all illnesses, :Transcend death and live eternally.
===Man===
:I am Truth, :The Angel from Truth, :The Light that shines brilliantly from Truth, :The Light that illuminates and destroys delusion.
:I am the Way, :Those who live by my Words will not err from the Way.
:I am Life, :Those who draw from me will neither fall ill nor die.
:I am Salvation, :Those who trust in me will all be taken in and dwell in the True-Image Realm.
:When the Angel had thus recited, :The cherub asked again: :"Lord, explain the true nature of man."
:The Angel replied: :Man is not matter, :He is not a physical body.
:He consists of neither brain cells nor nerve cells, :He is neither blood cells nor blood serum nor muscle cells; :Nor is he the composite of them all.
:You must awaken to the True Image of man.
:Man is spirit, :Man is life, :Man is immortality.
:God is the radiant source of man :And man is light emanating from God.
:Without light there is no radiant source, :Without a radiant source there is no light.
:Just as light and its radiant source are inseparable, :God and man are one.
:God is Spirit, :Therefore man is also Spirit.
:God is Love, :Therefore man is also Love.
:God is Wisdom, :Therefore man is also Wisdom.
:Spirit is not material in nature, :Love is not material in nature, :Wisdom is not material in nature,
:Therefore, :Man, who is spirit, love and wisdom :Has nothing to do with matter.
:The real man, :Being spirit, :Being love, :Being wisdom :And being life, :Cannot commit a sin, :Cannot become ill :And cannot die.
:Sin, sickness and death are merely your own bad dreams.
:Awaken to the True Image of life.
:Awaken to your True Image which is the real man.
:Real man is God-man, :The image of God Himself.
:He who perishes is not the real man. :He who commits sin is not the real man. :He who becomes ill is not the real man.
:Mankind, I say to you: :Awaken to your own true nature.
:You yourselves are the real man and never anything else.
:Therefore, when seen from Truth :Man cannot commit sin, cannot fall ill and cannot die.
:Who could dare say, "You sinners, sinners"?
:Since God did not create sinners, :There is not a single sinner in this world.
:Sin is contrary to the child of God's true nature.
:Sickness is contrary to the true nature of life itself, :Death is contrary to the true nature of life itself.
:Sin, sickness and death are merely nonexistent shadows of delusion, :imagined in a bad dream.
:In the True-Image World :God and man are one; :God is the radiant source, :Man is the light emanated from God.
:The illusion that has led mankind to see the bad dream :That sin, sickness and death are real :Is rooted in the ancient theology that man is made from dust.
:More recently it is founded on modern science's claim that man is made of matter.
:These are the first dream which led mankind to the illusion of sin, sickness and death.
:When the first dream is destroyed, :The fundamental cause of sin, sickness and death is destroyed.
:And they return to their original nothingness.
:You recover from illness by reading the Seicho-No-Ie and knowing the Truth :Because your first dream is destroyed.
:When there is no first dream, :There will be no dreams to follow.
:When there are no dreams at all, ::as man is originally undefiled, :He cannot commit a sin even if he so desires.
:When there are no dreams at all, ::as man is originally free from illness, :He cannot fall ill even if he so desires.
:When there are no dreams at all, ::as man is originally infinite life, :he will never die.
:Therefore, all people of the world :Seek with the utmost care your Spiritual essence, :Do not seek this Spiritual essence in matter and in the physical body :which are the products of dreams and illusory thoughts.
:Christ said: :"The kingdom of God is within you."
:Truly, I say to you: :"Within you" means your true nature, the real man.
:Since your true nature is God-man, the kingdom of God is only "within you."
:He who seeks the kingdom of God without pursues a dream; :He will never find the kingdom of God.
:He who seeks the kingdom of God in matter also pursues a dream; :He can never build the kingdom of God upon this earth.
:Christ also said: :"My kingdom is not of this world."
:The kingdom of this world is merely a shadow. :The realm of eternal happiness is within you alone.
:Only when you have awakened to the realm of eternal happiness within :Can the realm of eternal happiness be manifest without as a reflection.
:Only when you have awakened to the life of infinite health within :Can infinite health be manifest without as a reflection.
:Man's five senses can perceive no more than a world of reflection. :If you wish to purify the world of reflection, you must purify the original mental plates :By removing the dusts of delusion.
:I have indeed seen the emptiness of the world of matter. :I have seen that the world of matter is nothing but a shadow. :I have seen too that man is light radiated from God. :I have seen that the physical body is but a shadow of the mind.
:Matter is but a changing shadow :Resembling the ever-shifting shadows on a revolving lantern.
:Therefore do not mistake the shadows that you see for Reality.
:Man's real nature is God-man, :Eternal, indestructible, immortal Spirit and not a machine made from matter, :Nor did matter first exist and then the Spirit reside within it.
:Such dualism is entirely false.
:Just as a silkworm does not live in a cocoon which first exists, :But spins its thread to form its cocoon and then dwells within it, :Matter is a shadow of the Spirit and a product of the mind.
:Man's real nature is above all life that is Spirit, :Spinning his mind-threads he forms his body-cocoon :and then he resides within it :And in this way the Spirit becomes the physical body.
:Realize well that ::the cocoon is not the silkworm. :If this is so, likewise the physical body is not man ::But merely his cocoon.
:Just as when the time comes ::the silkworm breaks out from its cocoon and flies away :Man, too, when his time has come ::leaves his body-cocoon and ascends to the spiritual world.
:Never assume the death of the physical body to be the death of man.
:Man is Life :And therefore he will never know death.
:In accordance with the state of his mind, the time and his needs, :Various conditions may appear in his physical body and circumstances.
:Yet life itself cannot fall ill, :Life itself cannot die.
:By changing your mind :You may freely change your health and circumstances.
:Yet the time will finally come :when life no longer needs its physical body-cocoon.
:Life shall leave its physical body-cocoon :And soar on to an even freer realm.
:Do not mistake this for the death of man.
:The essence of man is Life, :There can never be death for him.
:When the Angel had thus sang, :Exquisite and delicate heavenly music could be heard in the sky, :Flower petals showered from where we knew not, :As if in praise of the Truth taught by the Angel.
:(End of the Holy Sutra)
:May the merits of this Holy Sutra extend to all beings, :And may we, together with all living beings, awaken to and fulfill :our True Image.
'''End'''
